answer: They should reduce how much they rig, examine the common themes in the injuries, and work hard to prevent them from recurring.
evidence: Now I would expect someone who has inflicted multiple injuries which aren’t happening to other people to stop rigging so much, to go and look at the common themes in these injuries, to work very hard to stop them occurring again.
